chapters.name: Physical World and Measurement
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Introduction to physics, scope and excitement of physics, nature of physical laws, physics and technology. Units and measurements including SI units, fundamental and derived units, dimensional analysis and its applications.

chapters.name: Kinematics
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Motion in a straight line, motion in a plane including projectile motion and circular motion. Concepts of position, path length, displacement, speed, velocity, acceleration, and their relationships.

chapters.name: Laws of Motion
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Newton's laws of motion, inertia, momentum, impulse, conservation of momentum. Concepts of force, equilibrium, friction, and circular motion dynamics.

chapters.name: Work, Energy and Power
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Work done by constant and variable forces, kinetic and potential energy, work-energy theorem, power, conservative and non-conservative forces, conservation of mechanical energy, elastic and inelastic collisions.

chapters.name: Motion of System of Particles and Rigid Body
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Center of mass of a two-particle system, momentum conservation, rigid body rotation, moment of inertia, radius of gyration, torque, angular momentum, conservation of angular momentum.

chapters.name: Gravitation
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Universal law of gravitation, acceleration due to gravity, gravitational potential energy, escape velocity, orbital velocity, satellite motion, Kepler's laws of planetary motion.

chapters.name: Properties of Bulk Matter
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Elastic behavior of materials, stress-strain relationship, Hooke's law, Young's modulus. Pressure in fluids, Pascal's law, Archimedes' principle, surface energy and surface tension, viscosity, Bernoulli's theorem.

chapters.name: Thermodynamics
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Thermal equilibrium, zeroth law of thermodynamics, heat, work and internal energy, first law of thermodynamics, second law of thermodynamics, reversible and irreversible processes, Carnot engine and its efficiency.

chapters.name: Kinetic Theory of Gases
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Equation of state of a perfect gas, kinetic theory of gases, assumptions, concept of pressure, kinetic energy and temperature, degrees of freedom, law of equipartition of energy, mean free path.

chapters.name: Oscillations and Waves
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Periodic motion, simple harmonic motion (SHM), oscillations of a spring, energy in SHM, wave motion, types of waves, wave equation, speed of wave, superposition principle, reflection and transmission of waves.

chapters.name: Electric Charges and Fields
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Electric charge, conservation of charge, Coulomb's law, electric field, electric field lines, electric dipole, electric flux, Gauss's theorem and its applications.

chapters.name: Electrostatic Potential and Capacitance
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Electric potential, potential difference, relation between field and potential, equipotential surfaces, capacitors and capacitance, combination of capacitors, energy stored in a capacitor.

chapters.name: Current Electricity
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Electric current, Ohm's law, resistance and resistivity, series and parallel combinations, Kirchhoff's laws, Wheatstone bridge, potentiometer, cells and their combinations.

chapters.name: Moving Charges and Magnetism
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Magnetic force on moving charge, magnetic field due to current, Biot-Savart law, Ampere's law, force between current-carrying conductors, torque on current loop, moving coil galvanometer.

chapters.name: Magnetism and Matter
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Bar magnet, magnetic field lines, Earth's magnetism, magnetic properties of materials, para, dia and ferromagnetism.

chapters.name: Electromagnetic Induction
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Faraday's laws of electromagnetic induction, Lenz's law, eddy currents, self and mutual inductance, AC generator.

chapters.name: Alternating Current
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: AC voltage applied to resistor, inductor, capacitor, series LCR circuit, resonance, power in AC circuits, transformer.

chapters.name: Electromagnetic Waves
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Electromagnetic waves, their characteristics, transverse nature, electromagnetic spectrum.

chapters.name: Ray Optics and Optical Instruments
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Reflection and refraction of light, total internal reflection, lenses, lens formula, magnification, optical instruments like microscope and telescope.

chapters.name: Wave Optics
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Wavefront and Huygens principle, interference, Young's double slit experiment, diffraction, polarization.

chapters.name: Dual Nature of Radiation and Matter
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Photoelectric effect, Einstein's photoelectric equation, particle nature of light, wave nature of matter, de Broglie relation, Davisson-Germer experiment.

chapters.name: Atoms and Nuclei
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Alpha particle scattering, Rutherford's model, Bohr model, hydrogen spectrum, composition of nucleus, radioactivity, nuclear reactions.

chapters.name: Semiconductor Electronics
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Energy bands in conductors, semiconductors and insulators, p-n junction diode, diode as rectifier, transistor, logic gates.

chapters.name: Communication Systems
chapters.subject: Physics
chapters.description: Elements of communication system, bandwidth, propagation of electromagnetic waves, modulation and demodulation, amplitude modulation.
